the year. 

The sum of these two variables (MDCD_MC_MEDICAL_MOS + MDCD_FFS_MEDICAL_MOS) is equal to 
the total months of Medicaid coverage during the year. Note that this sum does not always equal the 
number of months enrolled in Medicaid due to missing data in the source fields (e.g., eligibility group 
code associated with the beneficiary state).
